headline: Google quietly reduces AI Pro plan capabilities amid vendor competition
body: Google has downgraded its AI Pro subscription plan, reducing the feature set available to paying users. This move reflects intensifying competition in the generative AI market and signals potential shifts in how major tech vendors approach their AI monetization strategies. For healthcare organizations evaluating AI platforms for clinical workflows and documentation support, vendor stability and transparent feature roadmaps are critical factors in selecting long-term partners. The downgrade raises questions about feature consistency and pricing reliability that healthcare IT leaders should monitor when negotiating enterprise AI agreements. Healthcare enterprises should document baseline capabilities in their vendor contracts to protect against unannounced service reductions.
